name: Vibej

featureBullets: color= — player color in hex or just red / green / yellow
ref= — URL of the game the player came from

textSample: Cursor Vibe Jam 2026 Proudly sponsored by ♪ CURSOR VIBE JAM 2026 A game dev competition where 90%+ of the code must be written by AI by @levelsio DEADLINE: 1 MAY 2026 @ 13:37 UTC 00 DAYS : 00 HRS : 00 MIN : 00 SEC 0 GAMES SUBMITTED 0 PLAYERS #vibejam FOLLOW ON 𝕏 21,419,339 impressions Submit Your Game Play the Games Read the Rules Press Release DIAMOND SPONSOR GOLD SPONSOR SILVER SPONSOR SILVER SPONSOR Sponsors welcome! DM @levelsio on X PRIZES 🥈 $10,000 SILVER 🏆 $25,000 GOLD 🥉 $5,000 BRONZE Real CASH prizes! $40,000 total in cash prizes! THE JURY @LEVELSIO Organizer @S13K_ Lead Judge Vibe Jam co-host and vibe code consultant @TIMSORET Game Dev Tim Soret — co-founder of Odd Tales, director of The Last Night @NICOLAMANZINI Judge Nicola Manzini — founder of Vibesail @ERICZAKARIASSON Judge Eric Zakariasson — designer at Cursor @OVERJUMPRALLY Judge Alessandro Schiassi — creator of Over Jump Rally ◀ ▶ GAME SUBMISSIONS SORT: NEWEST MOST PLAYED 24H MOST PLAYED ALL TIME MOST PORTAL TRANSFERS LONGEST PLAYTIME MADE WITH: CURSOR BOLT.NEW GLIF TRIPO CLAUDE CODEX VS CODE GEMINI ANTIGRAVITY LOVABLE V0 SUNO 🎰 Random Game PARTICIPANTS RULES & INFO vibejam2026 — rules.sh $ cat rule_01.txt Anyone can enter with their game. ! cat rule_02_REQUIRED.txt Add the JS snippet from the widget section below ↓ to your game — games without it are disqualified . $ cat rule_03.txt At least 90% of the code has to be written by AI. $ cat rule_04.txt Only NEW games created during the jam period will be accepted. Do not submit games that existed prior to April 1, 2026. $ cat rule_05.txt Game has to be accessible on web without any login or signup and free-to-play (preferably its own domain or subdomain). $ cat rule_06.txt Multiplayer games preferred but this is not required! $ cat rule_07.txt You can use any engine but usually ThreeJS is recommended. $ cat rule_08.txt NO loading screens and heavy downloads (!!!) — has to be almost instantly in the game (except maybe ask username if you want). $ cat ru
